positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a roaring lion's head, viewed front-on. The design should feature geometric tribal patterns combined with ornate, vintage scientific etching elements (like anatomical details mixed with floral motifs). The lion's mane and body should form a dynamic, high-contrast silhouette. Use a limited, rich color palette of deep sapphire blues, antique gold, and creamy bone white. The composition must be centered, maximizing negative space around the subject for optimal print appeal. Focus on crisp lines, cross-hatching for texture, and dramatic, almost cinematic rim lighting to make the black elements pop.
negative: blurry, lowres, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, fuzzy, faded, discolored, logos, anime, photo, realistic photo
